description: Permissions granted to the local password_gate origin (osl-gate:// custom URI scheme). The boot gate page needs to verify passwords, walk the recovery flow, and read lockout countdowns BEFORE any discord.com navigation occurs. Distinct from the `main-capability` scope (which is for the discord.com remote origin) so the gate has a minimal, audited surface — no whitelist/burn/identity commands are reachable from the gate page.
